title: Boost Average Current Mode Tuning Rules

sections.heading: Bandwidth ordering
sections.text: Tune the inner current loop first and keep the outer voltage loop well below the right-half-plane-zero frequency so the voltage regulator does not fight the boost power-stage limitation.

sections.heading: Gain direction
sections.text: If the response is too slow but stable, first improve current-loop tracking and only then increase outer voltage-loop aggressiveness.
